sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_query_id (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT queryID() AS current_query_id, count(*) FROM test_query_id GROUP BY current_query_id;
UPDATE test_query_id SET value = 'updated' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT queryID() AS query_id, MAX(value) FROM test_query_id GROUP BY query_id;
